decisions.reason: Internal book-project meta-summary of Anthropic's Economic Index + Education Report. Not an original research source — it's a synthesis FOR a forthcoming book. The underlying Anthropic studies (Handa et al. 2025, Education Report 2025) should be ingested as separate primary sources if not already present.

Re-promoted from SKIP to DEFER per user feedback (corroborating sources strengthen the KB). Re-promoted to DEFER. The summary itself contains rich KB-relevant synthesized data (concern percentages, light-and-shade tensions, regional variation, user quotes) that have value as a secondary source. Underlying primary materials: (a) Handa et al. (Anthropic 2025) - already in raw/handa-economic-tasks-claude-2025/ DEFER; (b) Anthropic 81K Interviews (https://www.anthropic.com/features/81k-interviews) - feature page, no formal paper; (c) possibly an Anthropic Education Report. Recommend: ingest the 81K Interviews feature-page content as a primary source if accessible; ingest Handa from existing workbench; selectively integrate this summary as additional reference.
